items.title: Pacers with a 23-16 lead after one quarter in their Vegas finale. Braden Smith with some solid passing and transition work early. Pacers stumbled when he exited the game. Taelon Peter and and Rienk Mast each have 5 points.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Pacers with a 23-16 lead after one quarter in their Vegas finale. Braden Smith with some solid passing and transition work early. Pacers stumbled when he exited the game. Taelon Peter and and Rienk Mast each have 5 points.

items.title: Taelon Peter, Jalen Slawson, and Braden Smith all with great starts to this game. All doing things the Pacers would hope to see from them in summer league, too.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Taelon Peter, Jalen Slawson, and Braden Smith all with great starts to this game. All doing things the Pacers would hope to see from them in summer league, too.

items.title: Taelon Peter with excellent on-ball defense there and the Pacers force a key stop. They'll get the final shot here, down one with 12.5 seconds to go.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Taelon Peter with excellent on-ball defense there and the Pacers force a key stop. They'll get the final shot here, down one with 12.5 seconds to go.

items.title: I watched Taelon Peter and play against Nate Bittle in an NCAA Tournament game two years ago. All to set up this riveting mano a mano today.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: I watched Taelon Peter and play against Nate Bittle in an NCAA Tournament game two years ago. All to set up this riveting mano a mano today.

items.title: Aggressive drive and dunk from Taelon Peter to start this one off. That's good to see.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Aggressive drive and dunk from Taelon Peter to start this one off. That's good to see.

items.title: If you read my article on Braden Smith's SL debut, you know I called for more off-ball switching to keep Jalen Slawson as the low-man. Watch Slawson. Swaps places w/ Taelon Peter & ends up swatting the shot at the rim.
items.author: Caitlin Cooper
items.body_excerpt:
If you read my article on Braden Smith's SL debut, you know I called for more off-ball switching to keep Jalen Slawson as the low-man. Watch Slawson. Swaps places w/ Taelon Peter & ends up swatting the shot at the rim.

More observations from Game 2: www.patreon.com/basketballsh...

items.title: Today's pod, from summer league action. Pacers lose (who cares), Braden Smith was much better, Jalen Slawson was MUCH better, but the Pacers lost some role player magic. Taelon Peter...

items.title: Braden Smith takes the screen from Taelon Peter. 76ers switch. Smith takes it to the cup and draws a foul. Two shots to tie the game with 5.7 seconds to go.

items.title: On Taelon Peter, the only player back from last year's Pacers Summer League who also happens to be heading to Vegas fighting for his two-way contract: www.indystar.com/story/sports...
items.author: Dustin Dopirak
items.body_excerpt: On Taelon Peter, the only player back from last year's Pacers Summer League who also happens to be heading to Vegas fighting for his two-way contract: www.indystar.com/story/sports...

media.title: Second-year Pacers guard using Summer League to lead even with roster spot not guaranteed
media.description: Taelon Peter is the only player on this year's Pacers' NBA Summer League roster who was also on last year's summer squad.

items.title: Small thing: With Braden Smith heading towards a two-way, Jalen Slawson's offer sheet suggests a battle for two-way slots is coming for the Pacers. Ethan Thompson and Taelon Peter signed two-year two-way deals last year: www.forbes.com/sites/tonyea...
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Small thing: With Braden Smith heading towards a two-way, Jalen Slawson's offer sheet suggests a battle for two-way slots is coming for the Pacers. Ethan Thompson and Taelon Peter signed two-year two-way deals last year: www.forbes.com/sites/tonyea...
